indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: A couch is not suitable for sleep as it lacks a backrest and is not designed for lying down.

indicators.name: bookshelf
indicators.rationale: A bookshelf is not suitable for sleep as it is not designed for lying down and has no back support.

indicators.name: desk
indicators.rationale: A desk is not suitable for sleep as it is not designed for lying down and has no back support.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: A chair is not suitable for sleep as it is not designed for lying down and has no back support.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: A potted plant is not suitable for sleep as it is not designed for lying down and can obstruct access to the bed.

indicators.name: window blind
indicators.rationale: A window blind is not suitable for sleep as it does not provide complete darkness and can be obstructed.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (Primary). The presence of a couch, bookshelf, desk, chair, potted plant, and window blind all contribute to a negative score. The lack of a bed or other suitable resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.
